section_title: Power to stay or restrain proceedings.-- The provisions of this Act with respect to staying and restraining suits and
content:
374. Power to stay or restrain proceedings.-- The provisions of this Act with respect to staying and restraining suits and
legal proceedings against a company at any time after the presentation of a petition for winding up and before the making of
a winding up order shall, in the case of an unregistered company, where the application OT stay or restrains is by a creditor,
extend to skittish and legal proceedings against any contributory of the company.
